name: WOD Retail Solutions Inc.
summary: WOD Retail Solutions Inc. focuses on operating as a retail management company. The company, through its 20% interest in WOD Market LLC, provides intelligent retail solutions for gym owners and coaches, including the management of retail sales, up front inventory purchases, ongoing inventory management, payments, marketing, and related services. The company was formerly known as Elite Data Services, Inc. and changed its name WOD Retail Solutions Inc. in September 2018. WOD Retail Solutions Inc. was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Denver, Colorado.
